channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Your developers are already running AI locally: Why on-device inference is the CISO’s new blind spot
item.description: For the last 18 months, the CISO playbook for generative AI has been relatively simple: Control the browser.Security teams tightened cloud access security broker (CASB) policies, blocked or monitored traffic to well-known AI endpoints, and routed usage through sanctioned gateways. The operating model was clear: If sensitive data leaves the network for an external API call, we can observe it, log it, and stop it. But that model is starting to break.A quiet hardware shift is pushing large language model (LLM) usage off the network and onto the endpoint. Call it Shadow AI 2.0, or the “bring your ...

item.title: From LLMs to hallucinations, here’s a simple guide to common AI terms
item.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

item.title: At the HumanX conference, everyone was talking about Claude
item.description: Anthropic was the star of the show at San Francisco's AI-centric conference.

item.title: ‘More bang for your buck’: 7 easy ways to boost your MacBook Neo’s performance for free
item.description: Help your new MacBook Neo run faster than ever with these quick performance tips.

item.title: You can grab a refurbished 2021 Kindle Paperwhite starting at just $49.99
item.description: We spend a lot of time at The Verge waxing poetic about the latest gadgets, but sometimes it’s the last-gen devices from several years ago that offer the better value. The 2021 Kindle Paperwhite is a great case in point — especially since you can grab it at Woot in refurbished condition with lockscreen ads, […]

item.title: Somehow Paramount’s ‘Avatar’ Movie Has Leaked, Too
item.description: Twitter's penchant for leaks now includes Paramount's 'Avatar: Aang, The Last Airbender,' which isn't out until October.

item.title: Slate Auto: Everything you need to know about the Bezos-backed EV startup
item.description: Slate auto burst onto the scene in April 2025. Here is a timeline that covers its origins, backers, product, and other new details.

item.title: DJI Romo P vs Roborock Saros 10R — which robot vacuum comes out on top when it comes to dodging obstacles? I put them to the test
item.description: Which robot vacuum offers the best obstacle avoidance and navigation? I put them to the test.

item.title: I spent 6 hours with Genshin Impact on the Galaxy S26 Ultra, and I can't believe how far mobile gaming has come
item.description: To test the gaming mettle of Samsung's Galaxy S26 Ultra, I spent six hours playing Genshin Impact on the highest settings.

item.title: J’ai essayé la XPeng P7+ : la voiture électrique chinoise qui se recharge deux fois plus rapidement qu’une Tesla Model 3
item.description: Dans un marché saturé par l'uniformité des SUV, la Xpeng P7+ joue la carte de la résistance. Cette voiture électrique ambitieuse compte bien enterrer définitivement la Tesla Model S avec un prix divisé par deux et une recharge deux fois plus rapide. Pari réussi pour cette nouvelle berline 100 % électrique ? Voici notre verdict.
